data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing layer within a template. Accepts partial updates via the CreateLayer schema - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated Layer object with all current properties. Changes to layer properties will affect all variants using this template unless overridden at the variant level.

message: Operation 'deleteLayer' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Description is empty. Added clarification about soft delete behavior, impact on variants, response code, and the rationale for soft deletion to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Soft deletes a layer from a template, marking it as inactive without permanently removing it. The layer remains associated with existing variants but is no longer available for new variants. Returns a 204 No Content response on success. Soft deletion preserves data integrity and variant history.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added clarification about soft delete behavior, impact on variants, response code, and the rationale for soft deletion to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.
